ValidationRule.description: Ensures that the correct Status - Food Safety is used at the appropriate Lead Qualification Stages.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( $User.Id!="0053A00000DPNX3", OR ( ISCHANGED(Status_Food_Safety__c) && ISPICKVAL(Status_Food_Safety__c, "Open"), NOT ( OR ( ISPICKVAL(LQS_Food_Safety__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Food_Safety__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Food_Safety__c, "Turnback"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Food_Safety__c, "") ) ) && ISCHANGED(Status_Food_Safety__c) && CONTAINS(TEXT(Status_Food_Safety__c), "Turnback"), NOT ( OR ( ISPICKVAL(LQS_Food_Safety__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Food_Safety__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Food_Safety__c, "Rejected"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Food_Safety__c, "") ) ) && ISCHANGED(Status_Food_Safety__c) && CONTAINS(TEXT(Status_Food_Safety__c), "Reject") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CONTACTS_010: The Status - Food Safety field cannot be updated to this value at the current LQS - Food Safety.
